faqItems.question: When will the official version release?
faqItems.answer: We are working hard to polish the product while ensuring high-quality performance. The release date, or whether to extend the beta, will be determined based on test feedback and development progress.

faqItems.question: How to connect your Steam account?
faqItems.answer:
Go to the Library in the Mac client, then click Connect Steam Now on the right to link your account.
- First connection: Click Connect Steam Now and log in with your credentials or scan the QR code to authorize.
- Adding multiple accounts: Go to your profile, find Steam Account Management, click Add Account, then log in via credentials or QR code.

faqItems.question: How to import games?
faqItems.answer:
There are 3 ways to add games to your Library:
1. In the Library, click Import, then select an .exe file or scan a folder for executable files.
2. Drag and drop an .exe file directly into the client.
3. Double-click an .exe file on your device.

After importing, the system will automatically parse game information. You can edit the game cover, title, and description. Once added, games will appear in your Library. If not visible, click the refresh button in the sidebar.

faqItems.question: How to configure emulator compatibility?
faqItems.answer:
We have pre-configured compatibility profiles for over 200 popular games. Just click Play to use the default settings.
Advanced users can customize: After importing a game, go to its details page and open Windows Emulator Settings to manage containers and components.

faqItems.question: How to contact official support?
faqItems.answer:
Join our official Discord server for the closed beta:
https://discord.gg/CrseHKRQTQ
We provide download guides, troubleshooting support, and feedback collection in the server.
